title: How to improve communication between policy makers and stakeholders about the different types of permanent grassland in Europe and their capacity to deliver a range of ecosystem services for society?
description: A policy brief presenting a new permanent grassland typology designed to improve communication between policymakers and stakeholders by detailing management intensity, renewal frequency, and productivity potential across Europe. It outlines a two-level classification based on primary and secondary indicators derived from multinational stakeholder surveys and highlights its application for policy planning, monitoring, and ecosystem service delivery.
